title: Linum spicatum
taxonomy: Linum spicatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. The genus Linum is a part of the order Malpighiales, which is within the class Magnoliopsida of flowering plants. It further falls under the division Magnoliophyta and the kingdom Plantae. As a member of the Linaceae family, Linum spicatum is closely related to other species such as Linum grandiflorum and Linum lewisii. The classification of Linum spicatum reflects its evolutionary relationships with other flowering plants.
